titleStmt.title: SII 22.275: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 275. (A.R. No. 275 of 1906) NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT, WALAJAPET TALUK, TIRUMĀLPURAM. MAṆIKAṆṬHĒŚVARA TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL. TRIBH. RĀJARĀJADĒVA—15th YEAR.

summary.p: This records a gift of 64 cows and 2 bulls for burning two perpetual lamps in the temple by Araiyaṉ Nīṟaṇindāṉ Śēdirāyaṉ of Panaṅguḍi a “follower” of (the chief) Śīyaṉ Śambuvarāyar. The donor is said to have also made further gifts to the god, of two gold ornaments, a silver plate and two lamp-stands.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tiruvāykkeḻvi muṉṉāka tribhuvanaccakravattikaḷ śrī rāja rājadevarkku yāṇṭu patiṉṉañcāva
tu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu tāmaṟkoṭṭattu vallanāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tirumāṟpeṟuṭaiyārkku ciyaṉ campu
varāyar kaṉmikaḷil paṉaṅkuṭi Uṭaiyāṉ Araiyaṉ niṟaṇintāṉāṉa ceti rāyaṉ Iṉṉāyaṉār tirumuṉperiya vaitta ti
ruṉuntāviḷakkiraṇṭukku viṭṭa pacu Aṟupattunālum ruṣabha miraṇṭum Āka Uru Aṟupattāṟu Ikkoyilil śrīmāhe
śvarakkaṇkāṇi ceyvvārum śrī kāriyañceyvvāṉum tevakaṉmikaḷuṅ koyiṟkaṇakkaṉum Aṇukkaṉ cu
yokanu mittiruṉuntāviḷakkiraṇṭu mivarkaḷ Ācandrakālam Erippikka kaṭavarkaḷāka viṭṭeṉ niṟaṇintā
ṉāna cetirāyaṉeṉ .—itu(p) paṉmaāheśvara rakṣai .— Ippaṉaṅkuṭi niṟaṇintān cetirāyaṉ
Iṉṉāyaṉārkkuc cātta Iṭṭa tiruvāparaṇam poṟpū Oṉṟāluṅ kāṟai Oṉṟālum pon Aiṅka
ḻañcu mañcāṭiyu miraṇṭu mā ma— 1nta veḷḷi vaṭṭil Oṉṟiṉāl Eṭai nāṟpatteṇkaḻañce Ira
ṇṭu mañcāṭiyum nālumā tirukkuttuviḷakku Iraṇṭiṉāl Eṭai Iru nūṟṟu nāṟpattirupalam *ippaṭṭattil pinpu Iṭṭa pon Āṟu mañcāṭi Ākap pon 5 10 7 Iraṇṭu mā* .
The portion between the stars is engraved as interlineation above line 10.
Digital edition of SII 22.275 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
